PWA.UPDATE_AVAILABLE: A new version of Capitally is available. Reload now?

INSTALL_PAGE.TITLE: Install Capitally on your device
INSTALL_PAGE.SUBTITLE: Capitally can be used as an installable app on desktop, Android and iOS. The experience stays the same as the web app, with faster access from your home screen or application menu.

ANDROID.TITLE: Android
ANDROID.TEXT: Open Capitally in Chrome and use the install button when available, or choose Add to Home screen from the browser menu.

IOS.TITLE: iPhone and iPad
IOS.TEXT: Open Capitally in Safari, tap Share and choose Add to Home Screen. iOS does not always show an automatic prompt.

DESKTOP.TITLE: Desktop
DESKTOP.TEXT: On compatible browsers you can install Capitally from the address bar or browser menu, then open it as a standalone window.

NOT_FOUND.TITLE: Page not found
NOT_FOUND.TEXT: The requested page does not exist or is no longer available.

GUEST_ALERT.TITLE: Limited access
GUEST_ALERT.MESSAGE: This operation is not available for guest users.
GUEST_ALERT.LOGIN_HINT: Sign in to unlock all features.

LOGIN.TITLE: Welcome back!
LOGIN.SIGN_UP: Don't have an account? Sign up!

FORGOT.SUCCESS: If the account exists, you will receive an email with a temporary password. After signing in, you can change it in Settings.
FORGOT.ERROR: Unable to send the new password. Try again later.
FORGOT.DAILY_LIMIT_ERROR: We have reached the daily email limit for password recovery. Try again tomorrow.
FORGOT.MONTHLY_LIMIT_ERROR: We have reached the monthly email limit for password recovery. Try again later or contact support.

REGISTER.TITLE: Welcome!
REGISTER.PASSWORD_MIN_ERROR: Password must be at least 6 characters long
REGISTER.SIGN_IN: Already have an account? Sign in
REGISTER.LEGAL_PREFIX: I confirm that I have read and accept
REGISTER.LEGAL_REQUIRED_ERROR: You must accept the Terms and Privacy Policy to sign up

HERO.TITLE: Capitally
HERO.SUBTITLE: Capitally turns your transactions into charts, statistics and insights that are simple to read.
HERO.GUEST_HINT: Try guest mode right away: explore dashboards, accounts, transactions and summaries with demo data, without creating an account.

QUESTIONS.MONTHLY_SPEND: Do you really know how much you spend every month?
QUESTIONS.ACCOUNT_WEIGHT: Which account weighs most on your balance?
QUESTIONS.SAVINGS: How much are you actually saving?

DASHBOARD.TITLE: Complete dashboard
DASHBOARD.SUBTITLE: Balance, trends and activity at a glance.

ACCOUNTS.TITLE: Accounts and transfers
ACCOUNTS.SUBTITLE: Organize balances, currencies and moves between accounts.

TRANSACTIONS.TITLE: Live transactions
TRANSACTIONS.SUBTITLE: Every expense immediately updates categories and stats.

SUMMARY.TITLE: Clear insights
SUMMARY.SUBTITLE: See where you improve and where the budget slips.

PRODUCT.TITLE: Tools to decide earlier
PRODUCT.TEXT: Capitally does not only show what already happened: it helps you plan recurring activity, control budgets, move money between accounts and import data without losing structure.

RECURRING.TITLE: Recurring
RECURRING.TEXT: See rent, subscriptions and repeated payments before they arrive.

BUDGET.TITLE: Budget
BUDGET.TEXT: Track monthly progress and understand when you are crossing limits.

IMPORT.TITLE: CSV import
IMPORT.TEXT: Bring in existing data and keep a consistent history without retyping everything.

TRANSFERS.TITLE: Transfers
TRANSFERS.TEXT: Move money between accounts without confusing income, expenses and real balance.

FEATURES.TITLE: Everything you need to track better
FEATURES.SUBTITLE: From the first transaction to the yearly summary, Capitally keeps things organized without scattered spreadsheets or manual calculations.

ACCOUNTS.TITLE: Accounts and currencies
ACCOUNTS.TEXT: Manage different accounts, initial balances and currencies, including or excluding what should not affect your total balance.

TRANSACTIONS.TITLE: Income and expenses
TRANSACTIONS.TEXT: Record activity with category, account, date, description and amount so every financial choice can be understood later.

TRANSFERS.TITLE: Transfers
TRANSFERS.TEXT: Move money between accounts without distorting income and expenses, while keeping a clean transfer history.

RECURRING.TITLE: Recurring activity
RECURRING.TEXT: Set repeated payments and see what is coming next, from rent and subscriptions to installments and salary.

INSIGHTS.TITLE: Summaries and trends
INSIGHTS.TEXT: Filter periods, categories and accounts, then analyze balance, average expenses, top categories and income versus expenses.

IMPORT_EXPORT.TITLE: CSV import and export
IMPORT_EXPORT.TEXT: Import existing data or export transactions, transfers and accounts to keep an organized copy of your information.

FLOW.TITLE: From curiosity to clarity in minutes
FLOW.TEXT: Guest mode lets you explore the full experience with demo data. When you are ready, create your account and start building your real financial history.

STEP_1.TITLE: Enter as guest
STEP_1.TEXT: Open Capitally with ready-made demo data, no registration and no initial setup.

STEP_2.TITLE: Explore the visuals
STEP_2.TEXT: Move through dashboards, charts, categories, accounts and summaries to see how your habits become easier to read.

STEP_3.TITLE: Switch to your data
STEP_3.TEXT: Create an account when you want to save real transactions, recurring activity, accounts and preferences.

DELETE_CATEGORY.TITLE: Confirm deletion
DELETE_CATEGORY.TEXT: Are you sure you want to delete this category?

CATEGORY_SELECTION.TITLE: Select Category
CATEGORY_SELECTION.CONFIRM_CATEGORY_TO_DELETE: Are you sure to delete this category?

DUPLICATE_ALERT.TITLE: Existing Category!
DUPLICATE_ALERT.MESSAGE_CHOISE: Do you want to modify the existing one or cancel it?

DELETE_BLOCKED.TITLE: Account has transactions
DELETE_BLOCKED.MESSAGE: This account has transactions. Before deleting it, delete those transactions or move them one by one to another account.

TRANSFER.TITLE: New Transfer
TRANSFER.SUBTITLE: Move money between your accounts simply and safely.

HISTORY.TITLE: Transfer History
HISTORY.EMPTY: No transfers in the selected period

SUMMARY.TITLE: Summary
SUMMARY.SUBTITLE: Overview of transactions, balances and trends.

EXPORT.CONFIRM_FILTERED_OR_ALL: Do you want to export all transactions or only the ones filtered in the summary?
EXPORT.CONFIRM_ALL: No filters are active. Do you confirm exporting all transactions?

TRANSACTIONS.TITLE: Transactions
TRANSACTIONS.EMPTY: No transactions in the selected period

PASSWORD.TITLE: Change password
PASSWORD.ERROR_REQUIRED: Fill in all fields. The new password must be at least 6 characters long.
PASSWORD.ERROR_MISMATCH: The new passwords do not match.
PASSWORD.ERROR_CURRENT: The current password is not correct.
PASSWORD.ERROR_GENERIC: Unable to update the password. Try again.

TRANSACTIONS.TITLE: Confirm transaction deletion
TRANSACTIONS.MESSAGE: Are you sure you want to delete all your transactions?

CATEGORIES.TITLE: Confirm category deletion
CATEGORIES.MESSAGE: Are you sure you want to delete all your categories?

ACCOUNTS.TITLE: Confirm account deletion
ACCOUNTS.MESSAGE: Are you sure you want to delete all your accounts?

TRANSACTION_DELETE.TITLE: Delete transactions
TRANSACTION_DELETE.MESSAGE: Choose whether to delete transactions for a specific account or all transactions.

ACCOUNT_DELETE_BLOCKED.TITLE: Accounts have transactions
ACCOUNT_DELETE_BLOCKED.MESSAGE: One or more accounts have transactions. Before deleting accounts, delete those transactions or move them one by one to another account.

ANALYTICS.TITLE: Product analytics
ANALYTICS.DESCRIPTION: Share anonymous usage signals to help improve Capitally. No emails, tokens, descriptions or financial amounts are sent.

IMPORT.TITLE: Import transactions
IMPORT.UPLOAD_FILE: Select or drag the transactions CSV file here
IMPORT.UPLOAD_FILE_TRANSACTIONS: Select or drag the transactions CSV file here
IMPORT.UPLOAD_FILE_TRANSFERS: Select or drag the transfers CSV file here
IMPORT.UPLOAD_FILE_ACCOUNTS: Select or drag the accounts CSV file here
IMPORT.FORMAT_ERROR: The file must be in CSV format
IMPORT.HEADER_ERROR: The CSV does not contain the expected columns for the selected type.
IMPORT.GENERIC_ERROR: Unable to import the CSV. Check the file format and separator.

EXPORT.TITLE: Export data
EXPORT.DESCRIPTION: Set filters for transactions and transfers. The accounts file always exports every account.

ERROR.AMOUNT: The minimum amount must be lower than the maximum amount
ERROR.DATE: The start date must be before the end date

TEMPLATE.TITLE: Download template
TEMPLATE.DESCRIPTION: Download the sample file with the correct columns for each import.
